languages.text: "Вы оба нужны Клети. Все то, что случилось с вами — вина моей династии. Время искупить прегрешения моих предков".
"The Cage needs you both. What happened to you is the fault of my dynasty. It is time to atone for the wrongs committed against your ancestors."
languages.original_text: "Вы оба нужны Клети. Все то, что случилось с вами — вина моей династии. Время искупить прегрешения моих предков".

traits.locale_text: "The Cage needs you both. What happened to you is the fault of my dynasty. It is time to atone for the wrongs committed against your ancestors."
"Tsar-Cage needs you both. And what happened to you is the fault of my dynasty. It is time to atone for the wrongs committed against your ancestors."
"Tsar-Cage needs you both. And what happened to you is the fault of my dynasty. It is time to atone for the wrongs committed against your ancestors."
"The Cage needs you both. What happened to you is the fault of my dynasty. It is time to atone for the wrongs committed against your ancestors."

languages.text: 「ツァー・ケージは君たちを必要としている。君たちが経験したことは、私の王朝が招いたものだ。祖先たちにされた不当な行為を償う時が来た」
languages.original_text: "Tsar-Cage needs you both. And what happened to you is the fault of my dynasty. It is time to atone for the wrongs committed against your ancestors."

traits.locale_text: 「ツァー・ケージは君たちを必要としている。君たちが経験したことは、私の王朝が招いたものだ。祖先たちにされた不当な行為を償う時が来た。」

languages.text: "Kafes'in ikinize ihtiyacı var. Başınıza gelenlerden hanedanlığım sorumlu. Atalarınıza yapılan yanlışların kefaretini ödeme vakti."
languages.original_text: "The Cage needs you both. What happened to you is the fault of my dynasty. It is time to atone for the wrongs committed against your ancestors."

traits.locale_text: "Kafes'in ikinize ihtiyacı var. Başınıza gelenlerden hanedanlığım sorumlu. Atalarınıza yapılan yanlışların kefaretini ödeme vakti."

languages.text: «La Jaula los necesita a los dos. Lo que les ocurrió es culpa de mi dinastía, y es hora de expiar los errores cometidos contra sus ancestros».
languages.original_text: "The Cage needs you both. What happened to you is the fault of my dynasty. It is time to atone for the wrongs committed against your ancestors."

traits.locale_text: «La Jaula los necesita a los dos. Lo que les ocurrió es culpa de mi dinastía, y es hora de expiar los errores cometidos contra sus ancestros».

languages.text: “牢笼需要你们俩。你们所遭遇的一切，都是我的王朝造成的。现在，是时候为昔日对你们祖先所犯的过错赎罪了。”
languages.original_text: "The Cage needs you both. What happened to you is the fault of my dynasty. It is time to atone for the wrongs committed against your ancestors."

traits.locale_text: “牢笼需要你们俩。你们所遭遇的一切，都是我的王朝造成的。现在，是时候为昔日对你们祖先所犯的过错赎罪了。”

languages.text: « La Cage a besoin de vous deux. C'est ma dynastie qui est responsable de ce qui vous est arrivé. Il est temps pour nous de réparer les torts que nous avons causés à vos ancêtres. »
languages.original_text: "The Cage needs you both. What happened to you is the fault of my dynasty. It is time to atone for the wrongs committed against your ancestors."

traits.locale_text: « La Cage a besoin de vous deux. C'est ma dynastie qui est responsable de ce qui vous est arrivé. Il est temps pour nous de réparer les torts que nous avons causés à vos ancêtres. »

languages.text: "Der Käfig braucht Euch beide. Was Euch widerfahren ist, ist die Schuld meiner Dynastie. Es wird Zeit, das Unrecht zu sühnen, das Euren Ahnen zugefügt wurde."
languages.original_text: "The Cage needs you both. What happened to you is the fault of my dynasty. It is time to atone for the wrongs committed against your ancestors."

traits.locale_text: "Der Käfig braucht Euch beide. Was Euch widerfahren ist, ist die Schuld meiner Dynastie. Es wird Zeit, das Unrecht zu sühnen, das Euren Ahnen zugefügt wurde."
